name: The Obese Urge
description:
What if the voice in your head wanted you to get fat?

Introducing the Obese Urge - a thoughtform slinking into your character’s brain, encouraging them to eat more, exercise less and grow into a bigger and better version of themselves. Create a character at the launch or use a persona to get the ball rolling.

Additional Tags: feedee, feeder, feederism, weight gain, chubby, obese
creator: f00bar2
